name: co-dialectic
description: Co-Dialectic v4.4.0 — LLM prompt optimizer + auto-verify by stakes (Safe/Private/Shared/Significant/Live) + auto-handoff on closure + honesty selector (brutal/grounded/soft) + agent-swarm default-on + cross-family cascade-then-jury review (judge-panel) + hallucination detector + research-first mode + fish-swarm orchestration (mandatory pre-task gate, ships with install.sh, self-contained) + session handoff codification. Socratic coaching, persona detection, context management, prompt improvement, and Defense-in-Depth verification across any AI.
